overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character exploring a modern industrial facility, ascending a staircase from a shooting range observation deck to an upper level break room.

events.description: character turns away from the observation window to exit the area

agents.ego_description: standing at the observation window looking into the shooting range, then turning to exit toward the stairs

notable_agents.action: bald man in tactical gear pointing toward targets through the observation window

entered.detail: large reinforced glass window looking into an indoor firing range with visible targets
metal counter with control panels positioned in front of the observation window
structural pillar with black and yellow diagonal warning stripes
tall gray locker cabinet against the right wall
concrete staircase leading upward visible to the right of the observation area

segments.scene_description: The character stands at an observation deck overlooking an indoor shooting range, accompanied by an NPC. The area features industrial elements including warning-striped pillars and control counters. The character then turns away from the window to begin ascending the nearby staircase.

events.description: entering the enclosed stairwell from the observation deck area
passing under bright rectangular ceiling lights while ascending the stairs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the concrete stairs between walls with vertical lighting strips

entered.detail: vertical fluorescent light strips running along both walls of the stairwell
rectangular overhead light fixture embedded in the stairwell ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a narrow stairwell illuminated by vertical light strips on the walls and overhead rectangular fixtures. The space is enclosed with smooth concrete walls and steps, creating a utilitarian industrial atmosphere as the character climbs toward the upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper landing and break room entrance

events.description: exiting the stairwell into the upper corridor with artwork and elevator
entering the break room through the doorway marked with KORE signage

agents.ego_description: walking across the upper landing past a framed painting and entering a break room area

notable_agents.action: person standing near the counter inside the break room facing away from the entrance

entered.detail: large framed artwork depicting a landscape hanging on the wall at the top of the stairs
tall green plant in a dark cylindrical pot placed against the right wall
elevator doors with control panel on the left side of the landing
illuminated sign reading KORE above the break room entrance
counter with appliances and storage visible inside the break room
water cooler dispenser positioned near the break room entrance

segments.scene_description: Reaching the top of the stairs, the character enters a small landing area featuring a framed painting, potted plant, and elevator access. The character then proceeds into a break room marked by a KORE sign, where a water cooler, counter appliances, and another person are visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide industrial observation deck up through a utilitarian stairwell and into a cozy employee break room. It begins at an indoor shooting range overlooking the facility, where the camera turns away from warning-striped pillars and control counters to approach a nearby staircase. As the character ascends, the environment shifts into a narrow, enclosed stairwell defined by smooth concrete walls and the rhythmic glow of vertical light strips and overhead fixtures. The scene then opens onto a small landing decorated with a potted plant and a framed painting before passing an elevator. Finally, the camera moves into a break room marked by a KORE sign, transitioning from the cold industrial architecture to a lived-in space featuring a water cooler and counter appliances.
